queries.question: List all tour guides and also list travel agents from Expedia.
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPosting.title 
FROM HospitalityJobType JOIN JobPosting ON HospitalityJobType.id = JobPosting.hospitality_job_type_id JOIN Agency ON JobPosting.agency_id = Agency.id
WHERE HospitalityJobType.job_type = "Tour Guide" OR HospitalityJobType.job_type = "Travel Agent" AND Agency.name = "Expedia"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?hospitalityjobtype a :HospitalityJobType .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHospitalityJobType ?hospitalityjobtype .
  ?agency a :Agency .
  ?jobposting p:hasAgency ?agency .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w2 .
  ?agency p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?job_type_w) = "Tour Guide" || (STR(?job_type_w2) = "Travel Agent" && STR(?name_w) = "Expedia")))
}

queries.question: What tour guides are from Expedia and what travel agents are from the same agency?
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPosting.title 
FROM HospitalityJobType JOIN JobPosting ON HospitalityJobType.id = JobPosting.hospitality_job_type_id JOIN Agency ON JobPosting.agency_id = Agency.id
WHERE (HospitalityJobType.job_type = "Tour Guide" OR HospitalityJobType.job_type = "Travel Agent") AND Agency.name = "Expedia"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?hospitalityjobtype a :HospitalityJobType .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHospitalityJobType ?hospitalityjobtype .
  ?agency a :Agency .
  ?jobposting p:hasAgency ?agency .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w2 .
  ?agency p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?job_type_w) = "Tour Guide" || STR(?job_type_w2) = "Travel Agent")) && STR(?name_w) = "Expedia"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me tour guides and travel agents from the Expedia agency.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?hospitalityjobtype a :HospitalityJobType .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHospitalityJobType ?hospitalityjobtype .
  ?agency a :Agency .
  ?jobposting p:hasAgency ?agency .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w2 .
  ?agency p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?job_type_w) = "Tour Guide" || (STR(?job_type_w2) = "Travel Agent" && STR(?name_w) = "Expedia")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?hospitalityjobtype a :HospitalityJobType .
  ?jobposting a :JobPostings .
  ?jobposting p:hasHospitalityJobType ?hospitalityjobtype .
  ?agency a :Agency .
  ?jobposting p:hasAgency ?agency .
  ?jobposting p:title ?title .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w .
  ?hospitalityjobtype p:job_type ?job_type_w2 .
  ?agency p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?job_type_w) = "Tour Guide" || STR(?job_type_w2) = "Travel Agent")) && STR(?name_w) = "Expedia"))
} }
}
